detailed_results.question: How far is it from the airport?
detailed_results.expected_answer: 222 Rajpur is 36.9 km from Jolly Grant Airport. Max Towers is 25 km from IGI Airport. Max House is 20 km from IGI Airport.

detailed_results.question: Does it offer parking?
detailed_results.expected_answer: Yes, all properties offer parking. 222 Rajpur provides 2 car parking spaces per townhouse. Max Towers provides 3 levels of basement parking. Max House provides basement, stilt, and podium level parking.
